Manhattan

Listed Manhattan transportation tokens from the A/C Catalogue.

NY630A I. Gibbs / Belleville & New York / U.S.M. Stage

Stage token. Listing discontinued.
NY630Da The N-York & Harlaem Railroad Company

Early railroad coach. Counterstamped rosette.
NY630Db The N-York & Harlaem Railroad Company

Early railroad coach. Counterstamped dog.
NY630Dc The N-York & Harlaem Railroad Company

Early railroad coach. Not counterstamped.

Exonumist is an independent collector resource focused on New York City token history.
